docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 40.00 SERVED MAY-26-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ZEE, RICHARD
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,710.11 FILED BY WEVER, PAUL AS TO DEFENDANT ZEE, RICHARD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-11-2016 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-11-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-11-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF PAUL WEVER & DEFENDANT RICHARD ZEE. PROOF OF SERVICE IN THE FILE IS NOT STAMPED FILED, BUT DEFENDANT ZEE WAIVES ANY IRREGULARITIES WITH THE POS. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-11-2016 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WEVER, PAUL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZEE, RICHARD $403.25 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $493.25 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT ZEE, RICHARD
